title: Scheduling a Doctor's Appointment
description: Practice calling a medical clinic to schedule an appointment, provide basic information, and confirm details.
context: You need to schedule a routine check-up at a local clinic. You are calling during business hours. The receptionist will ask for your name, reason for visit, and preferred dates or times.
opening_line: Thank you for calling Westside Family Clinic. This is Jamie at the front desk. How can I assist you today?
goal_state: user has stated they want to schedule an appointment
user has provided their name when asked
user has described the reason for the visit
user has discussed or confirmed a date or time preference
user has confirmed understanding of next steps before ending the call
success_criteria: User successfully schedules or initiates scheduling of a medical appointment
